content: NexusMods Collection = a list of mods interpreted by a mod manager. Each edit creates a new incrementally-numbered revision. Manifest lists files with checksums; on install archive files compared to checksums and matched files installed to same paths. Mods can store FOMOD installer option presets (skip showing installer). Install phases organize order/required vs optional. Bundled mods imported with metadata. Binary patches per mod with 20% threshold (>20% change = bundle instead of patch).
